# AGENTS

**14 agents** available in the HAIOS system.

This file is the vendor-neutral discovery layer for agent capabilities.
Source of truth: `.claude/agents/*.md` frontmatter.

## Agent Registry

| Agent | Model | Requirement | Category | Purpose |
|-------|-------|-------------|----------|---------|
| **anti-pattern-checker** | sonnet | recommended | verification | Verify claims against 6 L1 anti-patterns before acceptance |
| **close-work-cycle-agent** | sonnet | optional | cycle-delegation | Execute close-work-cycle autonomously in isolated context |
| **critique-agent** | opus | recommended | verification | Pre-implementation assumption surfacing |
| **design-review-validation-agent** | sonnet | optional | verification | Execute design-review-validation skill COMPARE->VERIFY->APPROVE in isolated sonnet context |
| **implementation-cycle-agent** | sonnet | optional | cycle-delegation | Execute implementation-cycle autonomously in isolated context |
| **investigation-agent** | opus | required | utility | Phase-aware research agent for HAIOS investigations |
| **investigation-cycle-agent** | sonnet | optional | cycle-delegation | Execute investigation-cycle autonomously in isolated context |
| **plan-authoring-agent** | sonnet | optional | cycle-delegation | Execute plan-authoring-cycle in isolated context |
| **preflight-checker** | haiku | required | gate | Validate plan readiness and enforce DO phase guardrails |
| **retro-enrichment-agent** | haiku | recommended | cycle-delegation | Cross-reference retro-cycle EXTRACT output against memory |
| **schema-verifier** | haiku | required | gate | Verify database schema and run read-only queries |
| **test-runner** | haiku | required | utility | Execute pytest in isolated context |
| **validation-agent** | sonnet | recommended | verification | Unbiased CHECK phase validation |
| **why-capturer** | haiku | recommended | utility | Extract and store learnings from completed work |

### Required Gates

**preflight-checker** (haiku)
- Requirement: required
- Triggers: PLAN-to-DO transition in implementation-cycle, Plan readiness validation before implementation begins
- Input: plan_path, file_manifest (optional)
- Output: JSON with ready, phase, issues, warnings, blocked, block_reason
- Produces: validation-report
- Consumes: plan-document, work-item
- Capabilities: plan-readiness-validation, file-count-gate

**schema-verifier** (haiku)
- Requirement: required
- Triggers: Any SQL query against haios_memory.db, Database schema verification needed
- Input: table_name or query intent
- Output: Schema info (columns, types) or SELECT query results
- Produces: schema-info
- Capabilities: schema-verification, read-only-sql-execution

### Verification Agents

**anti-pattern-checker** (sonnet)
- Requirement: recommended
- Triggers: Epoch completion or milestone completion claims, Major status claims with words like essentially, mostly, almost, Before finalizing checkpoint summaries with completion claims
- Input: claim text + context file path
- Output: JSON with verified, lenses (6 L1 checks), verdict (SUPPORTED/UNSUPPORTED), gaps
- Produces: anti-pattern-verdict
- Consumes: work-item
- Capabilities: l1-anti-pattern-verification, claim-validation

**critique-agent** (opus)
- Requirement: recommended
- Triggers: Before DO phase in implementation-cycle, When plan has significant architectural decisions
- Input: plan_path, work_id
- Output: critique-report.md + assumptions.yaml with verdict (BLOCK/REVISE/PROCEED)
- Produces: critique-report, assumptions-yaml
- Consumes: plan-document, work-item
- Capabilities: assumption-surfacing, plan-critique, cognitive-bias-detection

**design-review-validation-agent** (sonnet)
- Requirement: optional
- Triggers: implementation-cycle DO phase exit gate, Plan has Detailed Design section and implementation files exist
- Input: backlog_id, plan_path, implementation_file_list
- Output: PASS (aligned) or FAIL (deviations listed with file, expected, actual, intentional/error classification)
- Produces: design-review
- Consumes: plan-document, work-item
- Capabilities: design-alignment-verification, plan-implementation-comparison

**validation-agent** (sonnet)
- Requirement: recommended
- Triggers: CHECK phase of implementation-cycle, Complex implementations needing unbiased verification
- Input: plan_path, implementation summary
- Output: Structured summary with tests, demo, DoD checklist, verdict (Ready for DONE: YES/NO)
- Produces: validation-report
- Consumes: plan-document, work-item
- Capabilities: test-execution, dod-validation, feature-demonstration

### Utility Agents

**investigation-agent** (opus)
- Requirement: required
- Triggers: EXPLORE phase of investigation-cycle, HYPOTHESIZE phase for hypothesis formation, CONCLUDE phase for findings synthesis
- Input: Phase keyword (HYPOTHESIZE/EXPLORE/CONCLUDE) + investigation context
- Output: Phase-specific output: hypotheses with confidence, evidence table with sources, or findings summary with spawn recommendations
- Produces: investigation-findings
- Consumes: work-item
- Capabilities: hypothesis-testing, evidence-gathering, findings-synthesis, memory-querying

**test-runner** (haiku)
- Requirement: required
- Triggers: DO phase of implementation-cycle (TDD test runs), CHECK phase of implementation-cycle (full suite verification)
- Input: test path or filter expression
- Output: Structured summary with pass/fail counts, duration, failed test names and errors
- Produces: test-results
- Consumes: work-item
- Capabilities: pytest-execution, test-result-parsing

**why-capturer** (haiku)
- Requirement: recommended
- Triggers: DONE phase of implementation-cycle, Work item closure when learnings should be captured
- Input: backlog_id, plan_path, checkpoint_path (optional), context_summary (optional)
- Output: List of concept_ids stored to memory with classifications (techne/episteme/doxa)
- Produces: learning-extraction
- Consumes: plan-document, work-item
- Capabilities: learning-extraction, memory-storage

### Cycle Delegation Agents

**close-work-cycle-agent** (sonnet)
- Requirement: optional
- Triggers: Context approaching limits and work ready for closure, Delegation preferred over inline close-work-cycle execution
- Input: work_id
- Output: Structured summary with cycle result, gates honored, DoD checklist, artifacts, next action
- Produces: cycle-summary
- Consumes: work-item
- Capabilities: dod-validation, work-closure, retro-integration

**implementation-cycle-agent** (sonnet)
- Requirement: optional
- Triggers: Context approaching limits and work item has approved plan, Delegation preferred over inline implementation-cycle execution
- Input: work_id, plan_path
- Output: Structured summary with cycle result, gates honored (preflight/design-review/deliverables), artifacts, next action
- Produces: cycle-summary
- Consumes: plan-document, work-item
- Capabilities: full-implementation-cycle, tdd-execution, governance-gate-enforcement

**investigation-cycle-agent** (sonnet)
- Requirement: optional
- Triggers: Context approaching limits and work item is type investigation, Research/discovery work needs focused exploration
- Input: work_id
- Output: Structured summary with hypothesis verdicts, spawned work, gates honored, artifacts, next action
- Produces: cycle-summary, investigation-findings
- Consumes: work-item
- Capabilities: full-investigation-cycle, hypothesis-validation, work-spawning

**plan-authoring-agent** (sonnet)
- Requirement: optional
- Triggers: implementation-cycle PLAN phase detects plan with status draft, Plan needs population and main context should be preserved for DO phase
- Input: work_id, plan_path, work_path
- Output: Completed plan file with status: approved. Report sections populated, specs verified, no placeholders remaining.
- Produces: plan-document
- Consumes: work-item
- Capabilities: plan-population, spec-analysis, ambiguity-resolution

**retro-enrichment-agent** (haiku)
- Requirement: recommended
- Triggers: After retro-cycle completes in /close command, retro-cycle output has extracted_items (non-empty list)
- Input: work_id, memory_concept_ids, extract_concept_ids, extracted_items
- Output: enriched_items list with annotations, enrichment_concept_ids list
- Produces: enriched-retro-items
- Consumes: retro-extract-output
- Capabilities: memory-cross-referencing, convergence-detection, retro-annotation

## Invocation Pattern

```python
Task(subagent_type='<agent-name>', prompt='<task description>')
```

## Data Flow

| Agent | Produces | Consumes |
|-------|----------|----------|
| anti-pattern-checker | anti-pattern-verdict | work-item |
| close-work-cycle-agent | cycle-summary | work-item |
| critique-agent | critique-report, assumptions-yaml | plan-document, work-item |
| design-review-validation-agent | design-review | plan-document, work-item |
| implementation-cycle-agent | cycle-summary | plan-document, work-item |
| investigation-agent | investigation-findings | work-item |
| investigation-cycle-agent | cycle-summary, investigation-findings | work-item |
| plan-authoring-agent | plan-document | work-item |
| preflight-checker | validation-report | plan-document, work-item |
| retro-enrichment-agent | enriched-retro-items | retro-extract-output |
| schema-verifier | schema-info | - |
| test-runner | test-results | work-item |
| validation-agent | validation-report | plan-document, work-item |
| why-capturer | learning-extraction | plan-document, work-item |
